entry.title: Complex Geometry
entry.content:
These are personal notes on complex geometry. They cover foundations of Kähler geometry, Chern connections and Chern curvature, Hodge and Dolbeault theory, differential geometry of complex vector bundles, Chern classes, vanishing results, the Calabi–Yau theorem, and Hermitian–Yang–Mills connections on stable vector bundles.

Download PDF
entry.summary: Notes on Kähler geometry, complex vector bundles, Chern classes, Calabi--Yau theory, and Hermitian--Yang--Mills connections.

entry.title: Geometry of Yang–Mills Moduli Space
entry.content:
These are personal notes on the geometry of Yang–Mills moduli spaces. They discuss the basic construction of moduli spaces of self-dual connections, the role of based gauge groups, the collar and cone geometry for definite four-manifolds, and curvature phenomena near the boundary of the moduli space.

Download PDF
entry.summary: Notes on the construction and geometry of Yang--Mills moduli spaces.

entry.title: Yang–Mills Blow-up Theory
entry.content:
These are personal reading notes on Yang–Mills blow-up theory, focusing on Uhlenbeck compactness, removable singularities, bubble formation, and energy identities.

Download PDF
entry.summary: Notes based on Uhlenbeck's papers and Yang--Mills lecture notes.

entry.title: Yang–Mills Blow-up Theory
entry.content:
These are personal reading notes on Yang–Mills blow-up theory, focusing on Uhlenbeck compactness, removable singularities, bubble formation, and energy identities.

Download PDF
entry.summary: Notes based on Uhlenbeck's papers and Yang--Mills lecture notes.
